content: Consider picking up a Helot from the Caro Standard Banner too, as she is a very good Support for Mouchette because she empowers the Damage of all Strikes temporarily
ill keep this in mind - ive been trying to read guides, but it is alot of overwhelming info q.q
She's also on Rate Up for that Banner particularly which makes her fairly easy to pick up

Fsfs, you just need to get 1 Copy of her. E1 eats away at your Hand as it will give you a Card with Exhaust & Retain and the following Enlightenments after that will only serve to raise her own Damage Output

If you're curious, the relevant Card is called Irregular Form which will allow you to choose between any of her Cards for 0 Cost, people will particularly pick up her 1 Cost Skill Lasting Loathe which will allow you to search you for your Team's Strikes

And for the relevant Terms

Exhaust - Playing the Card will permanently remove it from your Deck so it will neither come into Discard nor Draw Pile afterwards. But this will only be relevant for the current Battle that you are participating in. In the following Battle, the Card will be readily made available again to use unless you Exhaust it another time.

Retain - At the end of a Turn, instead of Discarding this Card it will remain in your Hand which will allow you to use it in another Turn where its use case will be more acceptable to meet. This will usually be to raise your potential Damage Output during Burst Turns or prevent yourself from losing more Health (or die)

TDLR: <@235313931982209024>

Consider picking up Helot to use her Exalt to raise the potential Damage Output of your Mouchette and search for Strikes from your Team to cast Mouchette's FuA (Follow Up Attack) which will typically trigger every 2 Strike casts. P.S. Helot E1 is optional.
i will do my best to absorb this
For sure, I recommend it. This will generally be very good information that you can and likely will be using for the foreseeable feature
As Gameplay Mechanics like Exhaust & Retain will be recurring throughout the entirety of Arc 1 and delving into Arc 2 Content, D-Zone, P-Dive and Event Stages

i think i understood

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle
And for the relevant Brown Wheels that he used, this is what they do
Just to give you a general idea of them
Brown WoDs tend to be especially overpowered in Arc 1 due to all of their unique Passives which can ease runs for you

**Week 1 Mouchette Impressions** (Aggregated from current top EN players)

**Is Mouchette Powerful:** She is a strong A-tier dps with high burst damage. At high investment, her performance is comparable to top-tier dps.

**Stopping Point for Pulls:** E2 and E3 are both big power spikes. OE stun is extremely powerful. I don't recommend using her at E0

**Best Teams:**
* Mouchette, Helot, Thais, Aigis/other supports
* Mouchette, Hameln, Ryker, Ramona/Lily
* Mouchette, Casiah, Horla, Lily

**Can I Use Her With Lotan/Gelot:** I don't recommend it as you will effectively have 2 dps on the team. A support that adds a damage multiplier to Mouchette, or adds defense or utility which Mouchette lacks, will be more effective than another dps

**Covenant:** April Tribute or Dreams of Medicine. Prioritize Crit, Death Resist, Keyflare Regen

**Wheels:** Crit, Death Resist, Strike wheels work best. Her 2 best wheels are Lily wheel (better at low investment) and her own wheel (better if you have over 80% crit). Lotan wheel, Blade of the Titan, etc. are fine.

**Should I Pull Mouchette:** If you like her

**Should I Pull Mouchette Wheel:** If you are prepared to invest heavily in her. Her wheel is only good on her, and there are other wheels that can substitute

Oh sorry for the late response, I just woke up earlier but yeah I agree with Rain's points on the brown WoDs. But I'd just like to add that for the second Slot for Mouchette's Wheels you'd be better off running something like Analysis of Death or Critical Point to raise your Crit Chance + Damage: and you could also run Crimson Pulse for her Covenant for the temporary 30% Increase to your Crit Rate after casting Exalt.
Thanks a lot! Will look into doing that 😊
Although I'm now worried about the winkle E3 not working <:dead:1356082627509092372>

As for the ideal Brown WoDs, it would typically be 

BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions
I see, that's fair enough

Since it turns out that Winkle E3 may not work for Mouchette's Double Exalt according to Cheri. You can consider swapping her out for Cassiah where you can then use her (Telekinesis) to pick out other Awakener's Cards from the Ultra Space and ensure that the only Cards placed there are Mouchette's 1 Cost & 3 Cost respectively. During Ultra Turns, you can use Tinct to decrease the Cost of Mouchette's Cards by 1 (or reduce to 0 on OE)
